tables.title: Pediatric Defibrillation Energy Doses (Biphasic Waveform)
rows: Escalated dose; give epinephrine during CPR if IV/IO available
10 J/kg or adult dose, whichever is lower
Administer amiodarone or lidocaine during CPR

tables.title: Synchronized Cardioversion Energy Doses
rows: Unstable tachycardia WITH a pulse (e.g., wide-complex tachycardia, SVT with shock)
Sedate if clinical situation permits; never delay for sedation in an unstable patient
If first attempt at 0.5–1 J/kg is ineffective
Confirm synchronized mode is active; check for reversible causes

tables.title: Amiodarone vs Lidocaine for Pediatric VF/pVT
rows: 150 mg per repeat dose (up to 3 doses)
Alternative when amiodarone is unavailable or ineffective
